incident.message: The Google Play store has a policy that limits usage of MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Do not hardcode "/sdcard/"; use `Environment.getExternalStorageDirectory().getPath()` instead
A newer version of Gradle than 8.13 is available: 8.14.4
A newer version of `compileSdkVersion` than 34 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.12.0 is available: 1.18.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-compose than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity-compose than 1.8.2 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2023.10.01 is available: 2026.03.01
A newer version of androidx.room:room-runtime than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-ktx than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-compiler than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-testing than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4

A newer version of androidx.work:work-testing than 2.9.1 is available: 2.11.2
A newer version of androidx.room:room-testing than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.1.5 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test:core than 1.5.0 is available: 1.7.0
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.1.5 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.5.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2023.10.01 is available: 2026.03.01
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit than 2.9.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:converter-gson than 2.9.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of io.coil-kt:coil-compose than 2.5.0 is available: 2.7.0
A newer version of org.apache.commons:commons-compress than 1.26.0 is available: 1.28.0
A newer version of org.tukaani:xz than 1.9 is available: 1.12
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-test than 1.7.3 is available: 1.10.2
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:mockwebserver than 4.12.0 is available: 5.3.2
A newer version of com.squareup.okhttp3:mockwebserver than 4.12.0 is available: 5.3.2
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Formatting %d followed by words ("permissions"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("games"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("new"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("new"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 30
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 30
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 30
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
Unnecessary; `Build.VERSION.SDK_INT == Build.VERSION_CODES.Q` is always true here (`SDK_INT` = 29)
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 29
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 29. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
This library supports using KSP instead of kapt, which greatly improves performance. Learn more: https://developer.android.com/studio/build/migrate-to-ksp

show-url.description: Learn about how to enable KSP and use the KSP processor for this dependency instead

The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/app_icon.png` in densityless folder
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?

fix-composite.description: Replace with the edit extension function
fix-composite.family: Replace with the edit extension function
